channel.title: Cost Centers on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Cost Centers on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: AI credit pools for cost centers in the billing UI
item.description:
GitHub Billing UI now lets you manage a cost center’s AI credit pool directly when creating or editing cost centers. Before this change, that configuration was only available through another interface.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Per-user budgets for cost centers in the billing UI
item.description:
GitHub Enterprise Cloud now supports creating per-user budgets for cost centers directly in the billing UI. Enterprise admins can manage these user-level budgets alongside cost centers and budgets in one place.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Cost centers now support AI credit pools
item.description:
Cost centers can now be assigned caps on how much of an enterprise’s monthly included AI credits they can consume. The feature is available through the REST API.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Per-user AI credit budgets available for cost centers
item.description:
Enterprise admins can now assign a per-user AI credit budget to a cost center, with the budget applying to each individual member. The budget updates as cost center membership changes.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Cost centers now support enterprise teams
item.description:
GitHub cost centers now support adding enterprise teams as resources, so usage can be attributed according to your team structure. This update extends cost attribution for enterprises beyond individual resources.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Enterprises can now create up to 500 cost centers
item.description:
GitHub has doubled the enterprise cost center limit from 250 to 500. This applies to enterprises managing many business units, departments, or products.

  • Source: GitHub
